title: mentha arvensis var. occidentalis
intro: Mentha arvensis var. occidentalis, also known as wild mint or American wild mint, is a variety of mint plant that is native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. occidentalis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and provide relief from various health concerns.
